# Booking Engine Vendor Inputs

Add booking engine reports related to Summer Offers sessions, searches, bookings, revenue, promo usage, or referral sources.

Example files: bookings-by-date.csv, promo-code-redemptions.xlsx, revenue-summary.pdf, source-report.csv.

Caveats: Vendor attribution may not match GA4. Confirm time zone, booking status definitions, cancellation handling, and source fields.
